title: Concert Photography and Videography in St. Augustine: What Venues Get Wrong
excerpt: A lot of concert content produced for live music venues isn't doing what venues think it's doing. Here are the patterns we see most often, and what a better approach looks like.
author: diego-cerquera

hero.alt: Gary Clark Jr performing at Fort Mose Jazz Festival

content.caption: Crowd footage is what converts — people buy tickets to be part of an experience

content.alt: Artist performing at St. Augustine Amphitheatre
content.caption: Artist shots are important but shouldn't be 90% of your production time

seo.title: Concert Photography & Videography St. Augustine | What Venues Get Wrong
